details: Package some-theme@99.0.3 was scanned across 2 files with no a static rule matches and no behavioral findings. No install-time lifecycle execution, no network exfiltration primitives, no credential access patterns, and no obfuscated payloads were observed in the analyzed content. The unusual version number (99.0.3) may warrant maintainer awareness but is not itself an attack signal.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
